summary: The first Sichuan Baosheng role-to-flow audit on sc_odoo shows the delivered matrix is real but not fully aligned: PM and executive lack cost-work, and finance still has a contract navigation inconsistency.
verification: runtime/config audit confirms the frozen customer baseline on sc_odoo: customer_users=20, pm_role_users=4, finance_role_users=4, executive_role_users=4, business_admin_users=4
representative-user audit confirms PM and executive lack cost_work while business_admin overlays retain full first-batch flow coverage
representative-user audit confirms finance has action_construction_contract_my access while menu_sc_contract_income remains hidden

notes: PM and executive flow ownership is not fully aligned with the delivered first-batch work set because cost_work is missing
finance navigation remains inconsistent because contract action access exceeds contract menu visibility

next_step: Open the next governance batch to resolve PM/executive cost-work ownership and the finance contract navigation inconsistency before continuing full customer business-flow validation.
